name: Shard the Metal Sonic
description:
Shard the Metal Sonic hm well to be fair I did not expect that I would make this one next but of course as promised to a commenter known as @ShadeXD26153 though I must apologize for taking so long I would make them a bot but without further ado this is the 5th bot i have made and the 3rd bot from the Archie Comics with him being from the Pre-Genesis Wave Era who is also the original Metal Sonic within the comic series now as always I update these bots if they do not satisfy myself or you the people just lemme know
Version 0.1

Weakness will be added

I am not happy with this bot so I will do more later on
